Research

Research interests spanning learning, optimization, vision, and intelligent systems.

Artificial Intelligence

Intelligent methods for perception, reasoning, decision-making, and responsible automation.

intelligent systemsreasoningdecision support

Machine Learning

Data-driven predictive and descriptive modelling for scientific and applied problems.

classificationregressionmodel evaluation

Deep Learning

Representation learning with deep neural architectures for complex and high-dimensional data.

neural networksrepresentation learningdeep models

Metaheuristic Optimization

Robust nature-inspired search methods for complex, nonlinear, and constrained optimization tasks.

global optimizationnature-inspired searchfeature selection

Artificial Algae Algorithm

Bio-inspired population-based optimization based on the adaptive behaviour of algal colonies.

AAAalgal coloniesexploration and exploitation

Federated Learning

Collaborative model training that supports distributed data ownership and privacy-aware learning.

privacydistributed learningcollaboration

Semi-supervised Learning

Learning approaches that combine limited labelled data with abundant unlabelled data.

label efficiencypseudo-labellingrepresentation learning

Medical Image Segmentation

Computational analysis and segmentation of medical images to support clinical research workflows.

medical imagingsegmentationcomputer vision

Data Science

Data analysis, modelling, and interpretation for evidence-based insight and decision-making.

data analyticsvisualizationpredictive modelling

Decision Support Systems

AI-enabled systems that support transparent, data-informed operational decisions.

decision analysisoptimizationanalytics

Industrial AI Applications

Applied AI and optimization methods for industrial processes, quality, and operational intelligence.

industry 4.0process optimizationapplied AI
